productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Black Slippers
description: Shine with ultra glam sequinned slippers from carlton london. Wear them on a morning out with friends pairing them with shorts and a top, or with a short dress when dining out at night. Both ways, your feet will look as pretty as you!UpperThong straps with sequins on synthetic strapsToe separator lined with fibre for comfortMidsoleComfortable metallic footbedOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with floral pattern below the forefoot region doubling up as textured grooves for grip and stylingshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washStore the shoes away from sunlight
